docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REYES, RAFAEL "FRESH BLADES" AS TO DEFENDANT YOONES, ALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-29-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RAFAEL REYES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALI YOONES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
